control.description-key: Interactive project grid with tree/hierarchy view, resizable columns, sorting, filtering, per-column inline editing, progress bars, row selection, and optional resource assignment. Works with any data source.

data-set.name: dataSet
data-set.description-key: The data source to display (SharePoint list, Dataverse table, or collection)

property.name: resourceColumnName
property.description-key: Internal name of the People/Person column in this list (e.g. AssignedTo). Leave empty if no people column.

property.name: outlineLevelColumn
property.description-key: Column name containing the WBS depth number (e.g. OutlineLevel). Leave empty for flat table.

property.name: parentIdColumn
property.description-key: Column name containing the parent item ID (e.g. ParentTaskId). Leave empty for flat table.

property.name: sortOrderColumn
property.description-key: Column name for sibling sort order (e.g. SortOrder). Leave empty for flat table.

property.name: percentColumnName
property.description-key: Column name to render as a progress bar (e.g. PercentComplete). Leave empty to render as a plain number.

property.name: enableInlineCreate
property.description-key: Show an add-task row at the bottom of the table

property.name: editableColumns
property.description-key: Comma-separated column names that should be editable (e.g. Title,Status,DueDate). Leave empty for read-only.

property.name: tableHeight
property.description-key: Height of the table in pixels (0 = auto)

property.name: peopleSearchResults
property.description-key: JSON array of people from AD search. Format: [{id, name, email, role}]. Bind to: JSON(Office365Users.SearchUser({searchTerm: Self.peopleSearchQuery}))

property.name: onCellChange
property.description-key: Event raised when a cell value changes (editing or resource assignment)

property.name: peopleSearchQuery
property.description-key: Output: search text typed by user in the people picker. Use to search AD via Office365Users connector.

property.name: selectedItems
property.description-key: JSON array of selected row IDs when row selection is enabled.

property.name: onTaskCreate
property.description-key: Event raised when user creates a task via inline add. JSON: {parentId, title, outlineLevel}
